items.claim: Ponado has visibly aged significantly and looks physically depleted.
items.quote: Paneda looks like he's aged 25 years since he... He's hunched over. He has no muscle.

items.claim: Ponado has the tactical number of Braga and serves as his kryptonite.
items.quote: he's his kryptonite. He's Bra's kryptonite.

items.claim: Braga is considered a better fighter than Ponado despite the head-to-head results.
items.quote: Who's the better fighter, him or Braa? ... Braa. Not close.
